creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Danilo Egea Gondolfo from comment #3)


Sorry, I must have missed this ...

The problems occured on CURRENT with WITH_LLD_IS_LD. But since this feature has massive problems that time, I switched back to the legacy ld.

This has now overcome by events and the problem seems to be gone right now and was obviously "an early adopter" problem.

Regards,
O. Hartmann
